name: coderabbit
description: Run AI-assisted code review workflows with the locally installed CodeRabbit CLI.

interface.shortDescription: AI-powered code review using a locally installed CodeRabbit CLI
interface.longDescription: AI-powered code review using CodeRabbit. Verifies that the local CodeRabbit CLI is installed before running review workflows, then supports autonomous implement-review-fix cycles.
defaultPrompt: Review the current git changes with CodeRabbit and summarize the highest-risk findings.
Compare this branch against main with CodeRabbit and turn findings into a short fix list.
